name: ai-dev-assistant
description: Automate the full development workflow: Requirement → Plan → Code → Review → Test → Evidence, powered by GitHub Copilot

untrustedWorkspaces.description: In untrusted workspaces, Auto Spec Kit will not run the configured test command or auto-sync git, because these execute project-controlled shell/git operations. Trust the workspace to enable them.

chatParticipants.name: autospec
chatParticipants.description: AI-powered development workflow: plan, code, review, test, generate KB & user stories

commands.name: build
commands.description: Build a feature — full 13-step pipeline: plan → code → review → test → evidence

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Scan the project — generate Knowledge Base from your codebase

commands.name: rescan
commands.description: Rescan latest changes — update Knowledge Base with new code

commands.name: review
commands.description: Review current file — check security, architecture, performance, business logic

commands.name: ask
commands.description: Ask about codebase — natural language Q&A powered by Knowledge Base

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Plan user stories — Epic → Features → Impact Analysis → Sprint Plan (PO/BA)

commands.name: map
commands.description: Map the codebase — interactive dependency graph with AI enrichment

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show all commands, KB status, and quick-start guide

commands.title: 🚀 Auto Spec Kit: Build Feature (13-step pipeline)
📚 Auto Spec Kit: Scan Project (generate Knowledge Base)
🔍 Auto Spec Kit: Review Current File
📚 Auto Spec Kit: Rescan Latest Changes (update KB)
💬 Auto Spec Kit: Ask About Codebase
📋 Auto Spec Kit: Plan User Stories (PO/BA)
🔭 Auto Spec Kit: Map Codebase (dependency graph)

autoSpecKit.testCommand.description: Command to run tests. Example: npx jest --coverage --coverageReporters=text 2>&1

autoSpecKit.language.description: Primary programming language of the project

autoSpecKit.knowledgeBasePath.description: Relative path to the knowledge base folder

autoSpecKit.autoApplyCode.description: Automatically apply generated code without asking

autoSpecKit.sessionsDir.description: Folder where session outputs are saved

autoSpecKit.model.description: Preferred model ID for GitHub Copilot.

autoSpecKit.askModelOnStart.description: Show model Quick Pick before every command run so you can choose the model each time. Set to false to skip and use autoSpecKit.model (or auto-select the best available).

autoSpecKit.agents.maxParallel.description: Max sub-agents to run in parallel per step. Lower = fewer API calls, higher = faster but may hit rate limits.

autoSpecKit.agents.mergeStrategy.description: How to merge sub-agent outputs. 'auto' (recommended) = review steps use deterministic merge (no extra model call), generative steps use AI merge. 'ai' = always LLM merge (most tokens), 'concat' = simple join (cheapest), 'structured' = section-based join.

autoSpecKit.agents.contextStrategy.description: Build context size. 'smart' (recommended) = discover relevant files + cap the knowledge base in the system prompt, 'full' = inject the entire KB (most tokens), 'minimal' = requirement only, no file discovery (fewest tokens).

autoSpecKit.agents.systemKbTokens.description: Token budget for the knowledge base embedded in the build system prompt when contextStrategy = 'smart'. Lower = cheaper builds.

autoSpecKit.ask.maxContextTokens.description: Max tokens of knowledge base context loaded per 'Ask About Codebase' question. Only relevant KB topics are loaded, capped to this budget.

autoSpecKit.clarify.enabled.description: Assess requirement clarity before /build. If vague, ask targeted questions first (chat halts so you can refine; Command Palette asks via input boxes and enriches) instead of building the wrong thing.

autoSpecKit.clarify.threshold.description: Minimum clarity score (0-100) required to start a build without clarification. Higher = stricter (asks more often).

autoSpecKit.autoSync.description: Auto-fetch and pull latest code before every command (read-only — never pushes or commits)

autoSpecKit.autoSyncKBUpdate.description: Auto-update Knowledge Base when pulled code contains source changes
